content: Day-ahead prices in bidding zone SE3 spiked to 480 EUR per MWh during the evening peak as a cold snap drove heating demand while wind generation fell well below forecast. Cross-border flows from Norway were constrained by maintenance on an interconnector, and the transmission operator issued a tight-margin warning for the coming days.
note: notable price spike and tight margin

content: An unplanned outage of an 1100 MW nuclear unit removed roughly a tenth of national baseload capacity at short notice, pushing intraday prices sharply higher and triggering activation of upward balancing reserves across several hours of the trading day, with the operator signalling continued tightness into the weekend.
Routine publication of the weekly aggregated generation mix for the previous calendar week.
Scheduled maintenance window announced for a minor distribution feeder affecting a few hundred customers overnight.
